stemHtml: The pilot has to perform a quick turnaround. The weather conditions are OAT -6°C and light snow precipitation. What shall he/she do?

options.a: De-ice and anti-ice are not necessarily in these conditions.
options.b: Only de-ice and anti-ice the wings in order to save time.
options.c: De-ice and anti-ice, even if it results in a delay.
options.d: Anti-icing is enough in these conditions.
